airfare_rates.notes: CPI-normalized to 2025 dollars. Median used (high variance). Source: ExpAllocation AirFare rows.

metadata.new_in_v4_1: Customer x season lookup, Fine sub-bands (Under100/100-300) for Under-300 overnight, CPI-normalized airfare rates (re-fitted from ExpAllocation)
metadata.new_in_v4_2: GSA FY2026 geo-normalization: hotel_rate in each cell is now geo-neutral (divided by destination GSA lodging multiplier at build time). app.py re-applies destination multiplier at prediction time, correcting for local hotel cost variation by city/state.
